description: Style NoteChlorophyll jeans from peter england bring you the comfort of the meadows and grass. Extremely comfortable and stylish, they come with slight hues of green, yellow and brown. Relax in these jeans inspired by mother nature. Product DetailsBlue jeans, has a heavily washed, slightly crumpled and distressed look, low waist, relaxed seat, buttoned and zippered closure, belt loops around the waist, brand patch on the waist at the back, two insert pockets in front with a coin pocket above the right pocket and two patch pockets at the back with stitched detail and a crumpled lookMaterial and Care100% cottonWash separatelyDo not bleachDrip dry Warm ironSize and FitSlim legThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
